list.title: Connections
list.subtitle: Connect outside services to pull in data automatically.
list.connectCancelled: The connection was cancelled or denied.
list.connectFailed: The connection failed. Please try again.

calendar.subtitle: Pull in calendar events and spot meetings with clients.
calendar.notConnectedHint: Not connected — pull in calendar events and spot meetings with clients.
calendar.noEventsInRange: No events in the selected range. {{retry}} syncing again, or reconnect with an earlier date range.

invoiceScreen.title: Invoices
invoiceScreen.subtitle: Issue invoices and receipts, and import income from your receipts software.

whatsappScreen.title: WhatsApp
whatsappScreen.subtitle: Tapping the WhatsApp button opens a ready-made message you can edit before sending. Here you can set the default wording for each "message type".

client.label: Client message
client.hint: From the client card — an opener for a free chat.

reminder.label: Reminder
reminder.hint: Send a reminder to the client from the calendar.

meeting.label: Meeting reminder
meeting.hint: A reminder before a scheduled meeting, from the calendar.

receipt.label: Send receipt
receipt.hint: Once a receipt is issued — send it to the client with a link.

lead.label: Lead follow-up
lead.hint: Following up a lead from the follow-ups list.

payment.label: Payment request
payment.hint: From the client card when there's a balance — the amount fills in automatically.

help.gi: You generate these in your Green Invoice account: Settings → Developer Tools → API Keys. The Secret is shown only once — be sure to save it.
help.sumit: You generate these in your SUMIT account: Settings → Developers & Site Owners → API Keys (Company ID + API Key).

gi: Sign in to your Green Invoice account.
Create a new key — you'll get an API Key (ID) and a Secret.
The Secret is shown only once — copy it right away.
Paste the ID and the Secret here, then tap "Connect".
sumit: Sign in to your SUMIT account.
Settings → Developers & Site Owners → API Keys.
Use your private API key — not the public one!

err.invalidCredentials: Those credentials are incorrect. Please check and copy them again.
err.providerUnreachable: The service is unavailable right now. Please try again in a moment.
err.generic: The connection failed. Please try again.

invoiceCard.title: Invoices
invoiceCard.notConnectedHint: Not connected — issue invoices and receipts straight from Simplicity.
invoiceCard.brokenMsg: Your credentials are no longer valid — the key may have been revoked or replaced. To keep issuing invoices, reconnect.
invoiceCard.autoImportNote: We'll spot the income you've entered in your receipts software — and ask whether to record it here too.

businessType.label: Your business type
businessType.note: Determines which documents you can issue: a VAT-exempt business issues receipts only; a licensed dealer can also issue tax invoices. You can change this any time.
businessType.unsetHint: Choose your business type so we offer the right document types.

err.alreadyIssued: An invoice has already been issued for this transaction.
err.alreadyCredited: A credit note has already been issued for this transaction.
err.noClient: To issue an invoice, link a client to the transaction and save.
err.notConnected: No invoice service connected — connect one on the Connections screen.
err.notIncome: Invoices can only be issued for income transactions.
err.badAmount: This transaction has no positive amount — update the amount and save.
err.transactionNotFound: Transaction not found — refresh and try again.
err.invalidCredentials: The service credentials are incorrect — check them on the Connections screen.
err.providerUnreachable: The service is unavailable right now. {{retry}} in a moment.
err.providerError: The service couldn't issue the document. Check the details and try again.
err.docTypeForBusiness: Your business type can't issue the selected document type (a VAT-exempt business can only issue a receipt). Choose "Receipt" and try again.

actions.creditModalMessage: Issue a credit note that cancels {{doc}} for {{amount}}? A real tax document is created, and the income drops out of your totals.
actions.credsInvalidHint: The invoice connection is no longer valid — renew it on the Connections screen to issue.
actions.needClientHint: To issue an invoice — link a client to the transaction and save.
actions.dupReason: An invoice was already issued for {{client}} for {{amount}}{{date}} — this may be a duplicate.
actions.dirtyReason: This transaction has unsaved changes. The document is issued from the saved data, not your edits — best to save first.
actions.catalogError: We couldn't load the product list — you can type a description manually.
actions.itemHint: Pick an item from the provider's catalog, or write a free-text description.
